description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow set on a landscaped plot with a driveway leading to a covered garage. The structure features a flat roof design with multiple interconnected sections, including a main living area, a garage wing, and a rear section with a swimming pool. The exterior is predominantly light gray with large windows and several entry points, surrounded by manicured lawns, shrubs, and palm trees. The backyard includes a spacious patio area adjacent to the pool, with decorative plants and outdoor seating spaces. The front facade is defined by a wide driveway, a prominent entrance, and a mix of geometric forms. The overall layout emphasizes open space, clean lines, and a blend of indoor-outdoor living.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a garage, pool, and landscaped grounds, featuring large windows and geometric forms. The property includes a driveway, patio, and lush greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and manicured front lawn.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the swimming pool, patio area, and backyard landscaping.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the full length of the bungalow, pool, and garage wing.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view focusing on the garage, driveway, and pool area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
